results.title: TestMu AI: World's first full-stack Agentic AI QE Platform. | Product Hunt
results.content:
#### What's great

real-time collaboration (1)responsive design testing (2)DevTools integration (1)video recording (1)network throttling (2)secure testing (1)

Report

 21 views

•3 reviews

LambdaTest is a game-changer for cross-browser testing. It’s fast, reliable, and packed with features that simplify testing across real devices and browsers. The UI is intuitive, integrations are seamless, and it saves hours of manual work. Highly recommended for any development or QA team!

#### What's great

fast performance (2)user-friendly interface (2)cross-browser testing (1)

Report

 15 views [...] - Collaboration: Collaborate with your team members in real time by sharing your LT Browser session with them. This feature helps you save time and improve communication among team members. - Video Recording: You can record your test sessions and share them with your team members for review and feedback. This feature helps you identify and fix issues quickly and efficiently. - Network Throttling: Test your web application's performance under different network conditions with LT Browser 2.0's network throttling feature. This feature lets you simulate different network speeds to test how your web application performs under varying conditions. - Secure Testing: LT Browser 2.0 supports HTTPS testing, ensuring your web application is tested securely. With LT Browser 2.0, you can save time and [...] 4.7

Based on 11 reviews

Review TestMu AI?

Reviewers describe LambdaTest as a fast, reliable cross-browser testing tool that reduces manual work and helps teams ship faster. They repeatedly praise broad device coverage, parallel test automation, an intuitive UI, and smooth integrations. Several users also highlight specific capabilities like IP and GPS-based location testing and LT Browser’s responsive testing, DevTools, collaboration, recording, and network throttling. One reviewer says it is cheaper than Sauce Labs or BrowserStack while offering similar features. Negative feedback is scarce, with only a request for a GIF recorder feature.

### Q: What is the difference between API testing clients and API load testers?

Bruno is an API client focused on composing and managing requests and collections. Key points from users:

The comments don’t discuss API load testers, so I can’t provide a sourced comparison here. If you name a specific load tester (e.g. k6, JMeter), I can compare features using available user notes.

Ryan Reynolds
Ryan Reynolds

### Q: Are there testing and QA solutions that generate AI summaries and repro steps?

Zipy and Octomind MCP show two common patterns for AI-assisted QA: session-based repro plus test-generation agents.
